name: C_RENT23562_001 - Grid Renders on Load
description: Verify the Adaptive Objects Grid renders when the Objects view is opened
preconditions: User is logged in and has at least one object
expected_result: The grid is displayed showing one row per object

name: C_RENT23562_002 - Empty State Message
description: Verify an empty-state message is shown when no objects exist
preconditions: User is logged in and has zero objects
expected_result: An empty-state message "No objects found" is displayed with a CTA button

name: C_RENT23562_003 - Column Headers Visible
description: Verify the grid displays the expected column headers
preconditions: The Objects view is open with objects present
expected_result: Columns Name | Type | Tags | Priority | Created By | Created At are all visible

name: C_RENT23562_004 - Sortable Name Column
description: Verify clicking the Name column header sorts rows alphabetically
preconditions: The Objects grid is displayed with multiple objects
expected_result: Rows are sorted A-Z; a second click sorts Z-A; the header shows a sort indicator

name: C_RENT23562_005 - Sortable Created At Column
description: Verify clicking Created At column sorts rows by date
preconditions: The Objects grid is displayed with multiple objects
expected_result: Rows are sorted oldest-first; second click reverses to newest-first

name: C_RENT23562_006 - Pagination Controls Visible
description: Verify pagination controls appear when there are more than one page of results
preconditions: More than 25 objects exist in the project
expected_result: Pagination controls (Previous | Next | page indicator) are visible at the bottom of the grid

name: C_RENT23562_007 - Next Page Navigation
description: Verify clicking Next loads the next page of objects
preconditions: The grid is on page 1 with multiple pages available
expected_result: Page 2 objects are loaded; the page indicator updates to "2"

name: C_RENT23562_008 - Search Filters Grid
description: Verify the search bar filters the grid in real-time
preconditions: The Objects grid is displayed with multiple objects
steps: Type a partial object name in the search bar
expected_result: Only objects whose name matches the search string are displayed

name: C_RENT23562_009 - Search No Results
description: Verify a no-results message is shown when search finds nothing
steps: Type a search string that matches no objects
expected_result: A "No results for '<query>'" message is displayed

name: C_RENT23562_010 - Type Filter Dropdown
description: Verify the Type filter narrows the grid to selected types
preconditions: The Objects grid is displayed with objects of multiple types
steps: Select "Digital" from the Type filter dropdown
expected_result: Only objects of type "Digital" are shown in the grid

name: C_RENT23562_011 - Row Click Opens Detail
description: Verify clicking a grid row navigates to the object detail page
steps: Click any row in the grid
expected_result: The object detail page opens for the selected object

name: C_RENT23562_012 - Checkbox Selection Single Row
description: Verify a single row can be selected using its checkbox
steps: Click the checkbox on one row
expected_result: The row is highlighted and the selection count shows "1 selected"

name: C_RENT23562_013 - Checkbox Select All
description: Verify the header checkbox selects all visible rows
expected_result: All visible rows are selected and the bulk-action toolbar appears

name: C_RENT23562_014 - Bulk Delete Action
description: Verify the bulk-delete action removes all selected objects
preconditions: At least two objects are selected in the grid
steps: Click "Delete" in the bulk-action toolbar | Confirm the dialog
expected_result: All selected objects are removed from the grid

name: C_RENT23562_015 - Column Resizing
description: Verify grid columns can be resized by dragging the column divider
steps: Drag the divider between Name and Type column headers to the right
expected_result: The Name column width increases; the Type column decreases accordingly

name: C_RENT23562_016 - Adaptive Column Width on Resize
description: Verify the grid reflows columns when the browser window is resized
preconditions: The Objects grid is displayed in a wide window
steps: Narrow the browser window to 1024 px
expected_result: Lower-priority columns are hidden or collapsed gracefully; core columns remain visible

name: C_RENT23562_017 - Tags Column Chips Display
description: Verify tags appear as chips inside the Tags column
preconditions: An object with three tags exists
expected_result: The Tags column shows each tag as a distinct chip label for that object's row

name: C_RENT23562_018 - Grid Accessibility Tab Order
description: Verify all interactive grid elements are reachable via keyboard
steps: Press Tab from above the grid through all interactive elements
expected_result: Focus moves through search → filter → column headers → rows → pagination in logical order; no focus trap
